summary: Portfolio website project; user wants to deploy on GitHub Pages and edit their own code, and requested removing on-page text.
architectural_notes: Target deployment: GitHub Pages (static site hosting).

existing_features.title: Remove the text content corresponding to XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/footer[1]/div[1]/div[1]/p[2] by deleting the second paragraph in the footer (the 'Built with … using caffeine.ai' attribution line) from the FooterSection component.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove the text from the portfolio page/content (as requested by user).
Support deploying the portfolio to GitHub Pages and enable user to modify their own code.
